시편 104:1.content: Bless Yahweh, my soul. Yahweh, my God, you are very great. You are clothed with honor and majesty.

시편 104:2.content: He covers himself with light as with a garment. He stretches out the heavens like a curtain.

시편 104:3.content: He lays the beams of his rooms in the waters. He makes the clouds his chariot. He walks on the wings of the wind.

시편 104:4.content: He makes his messengers winds, and his servants flames of fire.

시편 104:5.content: He laid the foundations of the earth, that it should not be moved forever.

시편 104:6.content: You covered it with the deep as with a cloak. The waters stood above the mountains.

시편 104:7.content: At your rebuke they fled. At the voice of your thunder they hurried away.

시편 104:8.content: The mountains rose, the valleys sank down, to the place which you had assigned to them.

시편 104:9.content: You have set a boundary that they may not pass over, that they don’t turn again to cover the earth.

시편 104:10.content: He sends springs into the valleys. They run among the mountains.

시편 104:11.content: They give drink to every animal of the field. The wild donkeys quench their thirst.

시편 104:12.content: The birds of the sky nest by them. They sing among the branches.

시편 104:13.content: He waters the mountains from his rooms. The earth is filled with the fruit of your works.

시편 104:14.content: He causes the grass to grow for the livestock, and plants for man to cultivate, that he may produce food out of the earth:

시편 104:15.content: wine that makes the heart of man glad, oil to make his face to shine, and bread that strengthens man’s heart.

시편 104:16.content: Yahweh’s trees are well watered, the cedars of Lebanon, which he has planted;

시편 104:17.content: where the birds make their nests. The stork makes its home in the cypress trees.

시편 104:18.content: The high mountains are for the wild goats. The rocks are a refuge for the rock badgers.

시편 104:19.content: He appointed the moon for seasons. The sun knows when to set.

시편 104:20.content: You make darkness, and it is night, in which all the animals of the forest prowl.

시편 104:21.content: The young lions roar after their prey, and seek their food from God.

시편 104:22.content: The sun rises, and they steal away, and lie down in their dens.

시편 104:23.content: Man goes out to his work, to his labor until the evening.

시편 104:24.content: Yahweh, how many are your works! In wisdom, you have made them all. The earth is full of your riches.

시편 104:25.content: There is the sea, great and wide, in which are innumerable living things, both small and large animals.

시편 104:26.content: There the ships go, and leviathan, whom you formed to play there.

시편 104:27.content: These all wait for you, that you may give them their food in due season.

시편 104:28.content: You give to them; they gather. You open your hand; they are satisfied with good.

시편 104:29.content: You hide your face; they are troubled. You take away their breath; they die and return to the dust.

시편 104:30.content: You send out your Spirit and they are created. You renew the face of the ground.

시편 104:31.content: Let Yahweh’s glory endure forever. Let Yahweh rejoice in his works.

시편 104:32.content: He looks at the earth, and it trembles. He touches the mountains, and they smoke.

시편 104:33.content: I will sing to Yahweh as long as I live. I will sing praise to my God while I have any being.

시편 104:34.content: Let my meditation be sweet to him. I will rejoice in Yahweh.

시편 104:35.content: Let sinners be consumed out of the earth. Let the wicked be no more. Bless Yahweh, my soul. Praise Yah!
